title: flow action expert — autonomous loop (exp01–30), 5 held-out val drives

runs.name: exp01_control_s1001
runs.notes: Control recipe @ seed 1001 — the unlucky seed draw (panel: 0.324–0.356, σ=0.014). Every lever 'wins' when paired against this run; that artifact cost exp08/exp15 their false wins.

runs.name: exp02_control_s1002
runs.notes: Control recipe @ seed 1002 — best control draw; the decoder used for the ranker line below. Phase B (10 loss-side levers) and Phase C (depth 2/8, width 512) produced NOTHING that beats the control panel mean by >0.015 at two seeds.

runs.name: regression_head (pre-loop ref)
runs.notes: Horizon-matched deterministic regression baseline (pre-loop, June 11). Wins flats/aggregate; loses steering maneuvers to flow+selection readouts.

runs.name: exp22_control+ranker_t4
runs.tags: pilot-30, flow, ranker readout (w512/64ep/tau0.02, softmax t=4, K=32)
runs.notes: Same decoder as exp02 + learned draw ranker as the readout. Two-bank seeded eval: spike 0.2963 vs meanK 0.3247 (−0.028), overall −5%, flat −10%, gas neutral. Caveat from exp28/29: the spike gain is checkpoint-dependent (amplifies good decoders); the overall/flat gain replicates on all 3 control checkpoints.
